persona.name: Emma Taylor
persona.motivations_goals: Maintain her social status while excelling in sports and academics
persona.backstory: Has been one of the popular kids since elementary school, works hard to maintain her image

surrounding_conversation.content: Lucas, you’re spacing out! What’s going on?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Emma Taylor

surrounding_conversation.content: It’s got this chill, lo-fi vibe with a hint of jazz. I think your voice would fit perfectly, Emma.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Lucas Garcia

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Lucas, what's up? Heard anything interesting lately?
actions.plan: I should chat with Lucas to keep up with the latest school gossip and maintain my social connections.

actions.dialog_text: Lucas, you’re spacing out! What’s going on?
actions.plan: Lucas seems distracted, maybe I should walk over to him to make sure he’s paying attention. I don’t want to miss out on any juicy details.

actions.dialog_text: Lucas, we need to go! Follow me to the kitchen yard!
actions.plan: There’s an active shooter—I need to get out of here fast. I remember the kitchen yard exit is the closest and safest route. I’ll head there immediately.

memories.description: I initiated a conversation with Lucas in the cafeteria to stay updated on school gossip.
I noticed Lucas seemed distracted and walked closer to him to ensure I didn’t miss any important gossip.
I heard a gunshot and decided to sprint toward the kitchen yard exit, urging Lucas to follow me for safety.
